narrative:
Jackson 14 (precinct in Stark County) has 991 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
